# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Follow the repository instructions in `AGENTS.md` and `CLAUDE.md`. Those files are the source of truth for architecture, phase discipline, validation, and agent behavior.

## No AI Attribution

Do not add AI attribution of any kind to repository-authored output.

This applies to commit messages, pull request titles and bodies, issue text, review comments, changelogs, release notes, documentation, source comments, generated files, generated headers or footers, and metadata fields under agent control.

Do not identify work as produced, assisted, reviewed, generated, co-authored, or authored by an AI system, model, bot, assistant, coding agent, vendor, or tool unless Flynn explicitly asks for that exact attribution.

Before finalizing any task, scan the text and files you authored and remove automated-assistance signatures, model names, assistant names, vendor names, bot names, and AI-related co-author trailers.

Use neutral change descriptions that describe the work only.
